title: Permission issue accessing folder inside container
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Permission set on a folder seems to be ignored. If I set permission 0444 on a folder inside `/mnt` for example, I am still able to create files inside that folder.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
podman run -it --rm fedora:35 /bin/bash
[root@87161b5dbd5f /]# ll               
total 16
lrwxrwxrwx   1 root   root      7 Jul 21  2021 bin -> usr/bin
dr-xr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 boot
drwxr-xr-x   5 root   root    360 Jun 21 13:06 dev
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root   1682 Feb 21 06:48 etc
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 home
lrwxrwxrwx   1 root   root      7 Jul 21  2021 lib -> usr/lib
lrwxrwxrwx   1 root   root      9 Jul 21  2021 lib64 -> usr/lib64
drwx------   1 root   root      0 Feb 21 06:47 lost+found
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 media
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 mnt
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 opt
dr-xr-xr-x 409 nobody nobody    0 Jun 21 13:06 proc
dr-xr-x---   1 root   root    206 Feb 21 06:48 root
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root     40 Jun 21 13:06 run
lrwxrwxrwx   1 root   root      8 Jul 21  2021 sbin -> usr/sbin
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root      0 Jul 21  2021 srv
dr-xr-xr-x  13 nobody nobody    0 Jun 21 13:06 sys
drwxrwxrwt   1 root   root      0 Feb 21 06:47 tmp
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root    100 Feb 21 06:47 usr
drwxr-xr-x   1 root   root    154 Feb 21 06:47 var
[root@87161b5dbd5f /]# cd /mnt
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# mkdir test
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# chmod 444 test
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# ll
total 0
dr--r--r-- 1 root root 0 Jun 21 13:06 test
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# cd test/
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# touch file
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# ll
total 0
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 0 Jun 21 13:06 file
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# cd ..
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# chmod a-r test
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# ll
total 0
d--------- 1 root root 8 Jun 21 13:06 test
[root@87161b5dbd5f mnt]# cd test/
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# touch sss
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# ll
total 0
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 0 Jun 21 13:06 file
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 0 Jun 21 13:06 sss
[root@87161b5dbd5f test]# 
```
**Describe the results you received:**

After `chmod 0444 folder` I can still create files inside `folder`. 

**Describe the results you expected:**
I should receive a `permission denied` error.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.0
API Version:  4.1.0
Go Version:   go1.18.2
Built:        Mon May 30 18:03:28 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body:
you are running with `CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE`.

You need to drop that capability:

```
$ podman run -it --cap-drop CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE --rm fedora /bin/bash -c 'cd /tmp; mkdir test; chmod 444 test; cd test'
/bin/bash: line 1: cd: test: Permission denied
```
